commands.review_summary:
The PR passes generated plugin-skill realpaths into skill canonicalization, forwards a test-only pluginSkillsDir through syncSkillsToWorkspace, and adds regression tests for symlinked plugin skills.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +198. Total +210 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows generated plugin skill symlink records do not receive syncSourceDir/syncDirName on current main while sandbox setup calls syncSkillsToWorkspace for non-rw workspaces; the linked issue includes matching path-escapes-sandbox output.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer real sandbox proof before merge; there is no narrow code repair requested by this review.

target.title: fix(skills): sync plugin skills to sandbox workspace
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #86190

Plugin skills (`~/.openclaw/plugin-skills/`) are stored as symlinks pointing to real directories in installed packages (e.g., `/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/dist/extensions/memory-wiki/skills/wiki-maintainer`). In sandbox mode, `syncSkillsToWorkspace` copies skills into the sandbox workspace so the `read` tool can access them at `/workspace/skills/...`.

However, `loadGeneratedPluginSkillRecords` did not populate `syncSourceDir` / `syncDirName` for plugin skills because it did not pass `canonicalSkillDir` to `loadContainedSkillRecords`. As a result, `syncSkillsToWorkspace` could not copy plugin skills to the sandbox, and sandboxed agents saw host-only symlink paths in `<available_skills>`, causing every `read` of the `SKILL.md` to fail with:

```
Path escapes sandbox root (~/.openclaw/workspace; container root /workspace): ~/.openclaw/plugin-skills/wiki-maintainer/SKILL.md
```

This is the same class of issue fixed for core skills in #46257, but that sync did not cover plugin skills.

## Changes

1. **`loadGeneratedPluginSkillRecords`**: Pass `canonicalSkillDir: skillDirRealPath` to `loadContainedSkillRecords`, which sets `syncSourceDir` and `syncDirName` on each plugin skill record. This allows `syncSkillsToWorkspace` to copy the real skill directory (not the symlink) into the sandbox workspace. `skillDirRealPath` is safe to use because it was already validated against `allowedRootRealPaths` earlier in the function.

2. **`syncSkillsToWorkspace`**: Add optional `pluginSkillsDir` parameter, passed through to `loadWorkspaceSkillEntries`. When omitted (as in `sandbox/context.ts`), it defaults to `path.join(CONFIG_DIR, "plugin-skills")`, preserving existing behavior.

## Test plan

- [x] New test: `skills.plugin-skills-sandbox-sync.test.ts` — verifies plugin skills are synced from symlinked directories to sandbox workspace
- [x] New test: verifies multiple plugin skills are synced correctly
- [x] New test: verifies plugin skills that escape allowed root are not synced
- [x] All existing sync tests pass (`skills.build-workspace-skills-prompt.syncs-merged-skills-into-target-workspace.test.ts`)
- [x] All existing plugin-skills tests pass (`skills/plugin-skills.test.ts`)
- [ ] Manual test: start gateway with sandbox mode, verify plugin skill SKILL.md is readable
target.author: enjouzeratul
